summary: Iteration 146 - Backend Stability Refactoring (Packs 1-7 Centralization) - FULL REGRESSION PASS. All 42 backend tests passed (25 from v145 + 17 new v146 tests). The refactoring moved order creation logic into centralized services without changing endpoint signatures, payloads, or response shapes. Guest checkout, request submissions, sample flows, 20% margin math, and mocked email logging all remain intact.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. Created test requests, orders, and sample workflows during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 146 verified backend stability refactoring (Packs 1-7). All centralized services work correctly: 1) order_write_service.py handles guest order creation, 2) order_timeline_service.py logs events, 3) guest_checkout_activation_service.py creates account invites, 4) payer_customer_separation_service.py separates customer_name and payer_name, 5) notification_dispatch_service.py handles notifications. Key verified endpoints: POST /api/guest/orders (response shape: id, order_id, order_number, status='pending', message, account_invite), GET /api/guest/orders/{id}, GET /api/admin/orders-ops (enriched with customer_name, payer_name, status), GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} (full enrichment), POST /api/requests, GET /api/requests/ctas, POST /api/admin/margin-rules/calculate (10000→12000 = 20% margin), GET /api/admin/margin-rules, GET /api/vendor/orders, POST /api/admin/samples/from-request/{id}. All role logins work (admin, customer, sales, vendor).

F1_guest_order_response_shape.details: POST /api/guest/orders returns id, order_id, order_number, status='pending', message='Order created successfully', account_invite

F3_admin_orders_ops_list.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops returns list with customer_name, payer_name, status fields

F4_admin_orders_ops_detail.details: GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{order_id} returns enriched response with customer, vendor, sales info

F9_product_bulk_request.details: POST /api/requests with request_type=product_bulk and guest_email works

F11_margin_calculation.details: POST /api/admin/margin-rules/calculate with base_cost=10000 returns selling_price=12000 (20% margin)

F14_sample_flow.details: POST /api/admin/samples/from-request/{id} creates sample workflow with 20% margin (1000→1200)

F15_order_timeline_events.details: Guest order creation triggers timeline event logging

F16_payer_customer_separation.details: Admin order detail has separate customer_name and payer_name fields

F17_guest_checkout_activation.details: Guest checkout creates invited user account and activation link in response

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.

refactoring_verification.order_write_service: VERIFIED - Guest order creation delegated to create_guest_order_via_service
refactoring_verification.order_timeline_service: VERIFIED - Timeline events logged via log_order_event
refactoring_verification.guest_checkout_activation_service: VERIFIED - Account invites created via build_guest_checkout_account_invite
refactoring_verification.payer_customer_separation_service: VERIFIED - customer_name and payer_name resolved separately
